scripts.compile: find ejercicios -name 'ejercicio*.ts' | sort -V | while read f; do npx tsc --types node "$f"; done
scripts.start: npm run start:01 && npm run start:21 && npm run start:41 && npm run start:61
scripts.start:01: find ejercicios/01-20 -name 'ejercicio*.js' | sort -V | while read f; do echo "--- $f ---" && node "$f"; done
scripts.start:21: find ejercicios/21-40 -name 'ejercicio*.js' | sort -V | while read f; do echo "--- $f ---" && node "$f"; done
scripts.start:41: find ejercicios/41-60 -name 'ejercicio*.js' | sort -V | while read f; do echo "--- $f ---" && node "$f"; done
scripts.start:61: find ejercicios/61-80 -name 'ejercicio*.js' | sort -V | while read f; do echo "--- $f ---" && node "$f"; done
